title: Actually New Pose's
description: Tweaks hand poses for Hold My Items (HMI)
body:
[![Requires Hmi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e56d364b368d8ef038753f1bf3031a3b98a76f7.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)
> ### ℹ️ Info
Tweaks hand poses for HMI

Only weapon and tools poses have been changed

> # ❗Important

There are two versions available: one for HMI 5.1 (the latest version that supports 1.21.9 - 1.21.11) and one for HMI 5.0 (the older version that supports 1.21.5 - 1.21.8). Please select the version that is compatible with the one you are using!

![compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bf208fb14dd888a5e1d2ede299af5c7157770e3.jpeg)
